expressions.english: work to do; something to do
housework
difficult work; exhausting work
expressions.notes:
힘들다 = to be difficult, hard, tough; to have a hard time; to be tiring; to be tired
힘든 is the adjective form of 힘들다.

expressions.english: boring work; tedious work
expressions.notes:
지루하다 = to be boring; to be bored
지루한 is the adjective form of 지루하다.

expressions.english: to have a lot of work
to have no work
to work
to do work well

to leave work to (someone)
to entrust (someone) with a task
expressions.notes: 맡기다 = to leave something to someone; to entrust

expressions.english:
Did you finish everything?
Have you finished working?
What kind of work do you do?

He really does not do work well.
He is really bad at his job.
expressions.notes: 그 사람 = that person; he, she

expressions.korean: 그 사람은 일을 아주 열심히 해요.
expressions.english: He works really hard.
expressions.notes:
아주 = very, really
열심히 = (to do something) hard, diligently

expressions.korean: 오늘 할 일을 내일로 미루지 마세요.
expressions.english: Don't put off until tomorrow what you should do today.
expressions.notes: 미루다 = to delay, postpone, put off

expressions.korean: 회사 일이 너무 힘들어서 회사를 그만 뒀어요.
expressions.english: I quit the company because the company work was too exhausting.
expressions.notes:
회사 = company; office
그만두다 = to quit

expressions.korean: 할 일이 너무 많아서 지금은 나갈 수가 없어요.
expressions.english: I have too much work to do, so I cannot go out right now.
expressions.notes:
지금 = now
나가다 = to go out
-(으)ㄹ 수가 없다 = to be not able to + V; can't

expressions.korean: 지금 많이 안 바쁘면 제 일 좀 도와줄 수 있어요?
expressions.english: If you are not that busy right now, can you help me with my work?
expressions.notes:
바쁘다 = to be busy
제 = (polite) my; I
도와주다 = to help, give a hand
-(으)ㄹ 수 있다 = can, to be able to; there is a chance that + S + V

expressions.korean: 오늘은 회사에 일이 많아서 야근을 해야 할 것 같아요.
expressions.english: I think I have to work overtime today because there is a lot of work (to be done) at the company.
expressions.notes:
야근 = working overtime
야근을 하다 = to work overtime
-(으)ㄹ 것 같다 = I think + S + will/be going to; it seems like + S + will/be going to

expressions.korean: 요즘 일이 너무 바빠서 제대로 잠을 잘 시간도 없어요.
expressions.english: I am so busy with work these days that I don't even have time to sleep properly.
expressions.notes:
제대로 = properly
잠을 자다 = to sleep
시간 = time; hour

expressions.korean: 일을 열심히 하는 것도 중요하지만 건강도 챙기셔야죠.
expressions.english: Working hard is important as well, but you should also take care of your health.
expressions.notes:
중요하다 = to be important
-지만 = but, however; though
건강 = one's health
챙기다 = to take care of; to pack, take; to gather all together
